{{$ccfg := $.Data}} Hostname {{$ccfg.Hostname}} Domainname {{$ccfg.Domainname}} User {{$ccfg.User}} Attach {{if $ccfg.AttachStdin}}AttachStdin{{end}} {{if $ccfg.AttachStdout}}AttachStdout{{end}} {{if $ccfg.AttachStderr}}AttachStderr{{end}} {{if $ccfg.Tty}}Tty{{end}} {{if $ccfg.OpenStdin}}OpenStdin{{end}} {{if $ccfg.StdinOnce}}StdinOnce{{end}} ExposedPorts {{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.ExposedPorts}} {{$kk}}
{{end}} Env
{{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.Env}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
{{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
Cmd
{{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.Cmd}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
{{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
Image
{{$ccfg.Image}}
WorkingDir
{{$ccfg.WorkingDir}}
Volumes {{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.Volumes}} {{$kk}}
{{end}} Entrypoint {{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.Entrypoint}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
{{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}} OnBuild {{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.OnBuild}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
{{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}} Labels
{{range $kk,$vv:=$ccfg.Labels}} {{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
{{end}}
